hero.intro: It's nice to see you😊 I'm Vlad, a fullstack developer with a strong desire to create impactful digital experiences.

plantshop.description1: Created an all-device-responsive/adaptive design for an online Shop

posterprint.description1: Built the layout and functionality for an online shop
posterprint.description2: Developed a responsive and adaptive design for all devices
posterprint.description3: Implemented dynamic product cards and payment integration
posterprint.description6: Managed forms using Formik and validation with Yup
posterprint.description7: Integrated both internal and third-party APIs
posterprint.description10: Collaborated with team and worked closely with backend developers

kanmind.description1: Built a backend for Kanban board with Django and Django REST Framework, supporting boards, tasks, and threaded comments.
kanmind.description2: Implemented token-based authentication with custom user model.
kanmind.description3: Designed granular permission classes — board owners, members, task creators, and comment authors each have scoped access control.
kanmind.description4: Exposed dedicated endpoints for filtering tasks by assignee and reviewer for efficient personal task management.

coderr.description1: Built a services marketplace backend with Django REST Framework. Users can create offers, place orders, and leave reviews.
coderr.description2: Implemented role-based access control separating business and customer users with custom permission classes.
coderr.description3: Designed offer filtering with django-filters — supports search, ordering, min price, and max delivery time.
coderr.description4: Built an order management system with in-progress and completed order count endpoints per business user.
coderr.description5: Added a review system with filtering and dashboard analytics.

habitloop.description1: A full-stack habit tracking app that helps users build consistent routines inspired by the Atomic Habits framework.
habitloop.description2: Built a Django REST Framework backend with habit and daily log models, supporting daily, weekly, and monthly frequency types.
habitloop.description3: Developed a React frontend with an interactive monthly calendar modal showing progress, streaks, and the Atomic Habit Loop form.
habitloop.inDev: 🚧 Currently in active development — not yet live.
habitloop.feature1: User registration and authentication — currently built for personal use only.
habitloop.feature2: Onboarding guide to help users understand habit formation best practices.
habitloop.feature3: Further UX enhancements and habit analytics.

cvmatch.description1: An AI-powered full-stack platform that matches a CV against a job description and returns a detailed compatibility score with skill breakdown.
cvmatch.description2: Built a Django REST Framework backend that parses CVs and job descriptions using AI, extracts structured data, and runs a scoring algorithm.
cvmatch.description3: Developed a React frontend with a step-by-step match flow, animated result cards, score ring, matched/missing skill pills, and an AI-generated summary.
cvmatch.inDev: 🚧 Currently in active development — not yet live.
cvmatch.feature1: AI mock interview — 10 tailored technical questions based on the job description.
cvmatch.feature2: CV improvement tips — actionable suggestions to increase the match score.
cvmatch.feature3: Personal dashboard to track all matches, results, and job application status.

quizly.description1: A Django REST Framework backend that converts any YouTube video into a ready-to-use quiz set powered by Google Gemini AI.
quizly.description2: Implemented automatic transcript extraction via youtube-transcript-api with fallback to auto-generated transcripts across all languages.
quizly.description3: Built an AI pipeline that sends the transcript to Gemini with model fallback across three quota tiers.
quizly.description4: Implemented HttpOnly cookie-based JWT authentication with refresh tokens, blacklisting, and user-scoped quiz access.
quizly.description5: Quizzes are deduplicated per user — submitting the same video URL returns the existing quiz.

experience.title: Experience
experience.desc1: Development of the admin page and enhancement of functionality for creating events.
